value: 400.7278765 kg fuel; terminal mass 1504.2721235 kg; dry-mass violation 0.7278765 kg
scope: The nominal numerical objective agrees at 400.7 kg, but the audited solution violates the 1505 kg dry-mass lower bound and is not a physically verified solution.

assertions.literal: 不能表述为已满足全部物理约束的确认性燃料结果

value: ecos_avx, ecos_scalar, and ecos_auto each report 400.7 kg
scope: Three C ECOS executable paths only; numerical objective agreement, not physical feasibility or end-to-end validation.

assertions.literal: 三个 C 可执行路径当前均报告 400.7 kg

value: CVXPY+ECOS, CVXPY+Clarabel, and CasADi+IPOPT are recorded at 400.7 kg
scope: The three Python paths present in solver_comparison.json only; numerical objective agreement, not physical feasibility.
command: python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('paper/data/solver_comparison.json')); assert len(d)==3 and all(x['fuel_kg']==400.7 for x in d)"

assertions.literal: Python comparison 文件中的三条记录也均为 400.7 kg

value: Release ecos_avx reports a 7.361 ms mean CPU time over 1000 ECOS_solve calls on the Intel N150 project host.
scope: CPU time after setup; no raw per-iteration samples, p99, WCET, end-to-end, or target-hardware evidence.

assertions.literal: 不能据此报告 p99、最大值或 WCET
不支持 p99 或 WCET

value: near_nominal_v1, seed 42, 1000 samples, x/z position half-width 200 m and x/z velocity half-width 20 m/s
scope: Canonical deterministic scenario definition; y components are unperturbed.

assertions.literal: 两个 $y$ 分量保持不变

value: 1000 attempted; 483 success, 363 physical_violation, 153 solver_infeasible, 1 solver_error; audited success rate 0.483.
scope: Fuel statistics are conditional on 483 audited successes; one solver_error is unresolved and this is not a robustness pass.

assertions.literal: 不能表述为总体燃料分布或鲁棒性通过

value: MarsLanding.c is an independent manually maintained reference; MarsLandingAuto.c consumes CasADi-generated CCS data.
scope: The parameterized generator does not replace or generate the handwritten CRS-to-CCS implementation.

assertions.literal: 原始、独立实现的 SOCP 手写矩阵资产
C 手写版与自动生成版保持独立

value: Bare-metal and flight-control deployment claims are withdrawn; the current artifact is a desktop Linux C+ECOS prototype.
scope: Target-hardware cross-compilation, static memory, WCET, and closed-loop integration remain future work.

value: The recorded f32/f64 fuel difference comes from configurations with different tolerances.
scope: It cannot be attributed to floating-point precision without a controlled same-configuration experiment.
command: compile and run matched-tolerance f32/f64 benchmarks with residual audit

value: dm/dz=m gives an approximately 1500-fold local conversion from z error to mass error near 1500 kg.
scope: This is not evidence of the same amplification in automatic differentiation, gradients, or Hessians.
command: design and run a controlled sensitivity experiment before making derivative claims

value: The current scalar and AVX/FMA build records differ by about 2.4 percent.
scope: Memory-bandwidth or instruction-level causality requires controlled frequency and hardware-counter evidence.
command: collect fixed-frequency cache, memory, and instruction performance counters

value: Applicability beyond the Mars landing model is not established.
scope: Each new vehicle, dynamics model, and constraint set requires separate validation.
command: define a versioned scenario and validation evidence for each new domain
